entity.summary: Multi-chain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange and yield-farming protocol with current liquidity and recent trading activity, concentrated primarily on Avalanche.
entity.notes: Active classification is based on current multi-chain TVL and recent DEX volume. The first-party development organization remains available; no canonical public website domain was recovered in this review.

evidence.title: Complus Network protocol profile and current metrics
evidence.notes: Protocol profile reports current TVL and recent DEX volume across Avalanche, BNB Chain, and Polygon deployments.

evidence.title: Complus Network development organization
evidence.notes: First-party project development organization used to corroborate protocol identity.
